name: PAPARAZZI (Original)
description: Original Paparazzi template. The classic version — celebrity street energy, camera flashes.
asset_requirements: Front-facing product photo on a clean background.

input_manifest.label: Product Image
input_manifest.hint: Front-facing product photo on a clean background.

steps.prompt: Original Paparazzi style celebrity photo. A model wearing the clothing product is caught by paparazzi leaving a fashion event. Photographers with cameras visible, camera flash lighting effect, the model looks effortlessly stylish and caught mid-stride. Slightly candid feel but the clothing is clearly detailed and beautiful. 35mm film photography quality.

Original paparazzi video. Celebrity model leaving a venue, photographers surrounding them with cameras flashing, the model walks through confidently, the clothing shown beautifully in the flash-lit chaos, classic celebrity street photography motion.
